title: QA Packet
description: Single shared schema for visual QA packets produced per feature/branch. Consumer repos (SitFlow, NodeBench, etc.) declare states + fixtures and call a generator (e.g. Parity Studio) which emits packet JSON conforming to this schema. The packet feeds the side-by-side review UI, the Remotion demo video, and the Gmail Magic Resend email — all from one source of truth.

featureId.description: Stable slug, e.g. nodebench.chat.declutter.v1 or sitflow.care_rules.v1.

title.description: One-line human title for the email subject + review page header.

branch.description: Git branch the packet was generated from.

previewUrl.description: Live preview deploy URL where the change is reachable. The email's primary CTA points here.

reviewUrl.description: Hosted side-by-side review page URL. Generator (Parity Studio) writes this; consumer reads it.

whatChanged.description: 1-3 sentence factual summary of the diff

primaryComponents.description: Component slugs the change touches most (for snippet-level capture)

states.description: Deterministic test lanes — each is one (workflow × user state × persona) tuple. Generator produces one row per state.

id.description: Slug like returning-user-event-pinned. Stable across runs so before/after diffs align.

workflow.description: Workflow lane: home / chat / report / batch / inbox / calendar / etc.

userState.description: User state lane: new_user / returning_user / power_user / empty / loading / error / paid_locked / etc.

persona.description: Optional persona: startup_banker / founder / pet_sitter / vc_associate / etc.

appState.description: Optional app state seed key, e.g. event_pinned_report_saved.

testUrl.description: Direct link that loads this exact state for manual testing. Should encode persona + userState + appState as query params.

expectedChange.description: Plain-language description of what should change

gif.description: Path to GIF showing this state's interaction (loop-friendly, ~3-8s)

evidence.description: Free-form per-state evidence (DOM checks, console logs, network calls)

fixPrompt.description: Copy-pasteable prompt for the AI agent to fix this state's issues.

remotionVideo.description: End-to-end demo video covering all states. Generated post-capture.

scenesManifest.description: Path to scenes.json — Remotion scene-by-scene breakdown for re-renders.

email.description: Pre-rendered HTML for Gmail Magic Resend. Generator fills this when --email flag set.

actions.description: Tokenized action URLs the email surfaces (approve / needs-fix / regenerate). Implementation is generator-specific; the schema just declares the shape.

copyFixPromptToken.description: Click-through that copies the aggregate fix prompt to clipboard

version.description: Bumped each time the packet is regenerated for the same featureId. Magic Resend keeps history.
